mapper.select: select id, owner_id, owner_name, bill_type, bill_no, status, community_id, building, unit, room, create_time, update_time from community_bill where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into community_bill ( owner_id, owner_name, bill_type, bill_no, bill_amount, paid_amount, arrears_amount, bill_date, due_date, status, community_id, building, unit, room, usage_amount, unit_price, last_reading, current_reading, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{ownerId}, #{ownerName}, #{billType}, #{billNo}, #{billAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{arrearsAmount}, #{billDate}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, #{communityId}, #{building}, #{unit}, #{room}, #{usageAmount}, #{unitPrice}, #{lastReading}, #{currentReading}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_bill set owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, bill_type = #{billType}, bill_no = #{billNo}, bill_amount = #{billAmount}, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, arrears_amount = #{arrearsAmount}, bill_date = #{billDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, status = #{status}, community_id = #{communityId}, building = #{building}, unit = #{unit}, room = #{room}, usage_amount = #{usageAmount}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, last_reading = #{lastReading}, current_reading = #{currentReading}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_bill where id = #{id} DELETE FROM community_bill WHERE notice_id IN (${ids})
